query:
Perform a LinkedIn-only research on Maki People (makipeople.com) in three sequential steps.

STEP 1 — Find the exact LinkedIn company page URL for Maki People (format: linkedin.com/company/<slug>). The slug is derived from the company name or website domain.

STEP 2 — Scrape that LinkedIn company page and return the profile details: linkedin_url, plus the 5 most senior CURRENT EMPLOYEES of Maki People from the People tab (CEO, CTO, CPO, co-founders, VP-level). For each person: name, current role AT Maki People (not at a previous employer), exact personal profile URL (linkedin.com/in/<slug>), and a one-sentence background that begins with their current role at Maki People (e.g. 'Co-founder & CTO at Maki People, ...'). Include only people who currently work at Maki People — exclude external partners, customers, advisors, or event speakers merely mentioned in posts. If fewer than 5 verified employees can be found, return only the verified ones — do NOT pad with placeholders or null entries.

STEP 3 — Return the 3 to 5 MOST RECENT public posts from Maki People's company page or its founders (last 12 months). For each: date (YYYY-MM-DD), author name, signal (post headline or first 150 chars), full post URL (linkedin.com/posts/...).

If a field cannot be retrieved from LinkedIn, OMIT it from the response. Do not fabricate values or pull from other sources. Do not invent placeholder data.
answer:
{"step_1_linkedin_company_page_url": "**linkedin_url:** `linkedin.com/company/makipeople`

The slug is `makipeople`, derived from the company's domain (makipeople.com). The company page lists MakiPeople in the Software Development industry with 51-200 employees, and its tagline reads: "AI agents running hiring end to end, from first application to hire decision, on top of your existing ATS." Organizations like H&M, PwC, Amazon, Nestle, and Sephora are cited as clients.

Source: [step_1_linkedin_company_page_url[0]] [15]

---", "step_2_5_most_senior_current_employees": "| # | Name | Current Role at Maki People | Personal LinkedIn URL | Background (one sentence) |
|---|------|-----------------------------|----------------------|---------------------------|
| 1 | **Maxime Legardez Coquin** | CEO & Co-founder | linkedin.com/in/maximelegardez | CEO & Co-founder at Maki People, building the world's first AI layer that runs the entire hiring process; previously Managing Director France at sennder and EDHEC Business School graduate. |
| 2 | **Paul-Louis Caylar** | Co-founder & COO | linkedin.com/in/paullouiscaylar | Co-founder & COO at Maki People, former McKinsey partner who previously served as Managing Director France at sennder. |
| 3 | **Benjamin Chino** | Co-founder & CPO | linkedin.com/in/ben-chino | Co-founder & CPO at Maki People, building AI agents that liberate HR teams and advance organizations; previously VP Product at sennder and Product Operations lead at Uber; Forbes 30 Under 30 honoree and HEC Paris graduate. |
| 4 | **Damien Peltier** | VP of Engineering | linkedin.com/in/damien-peltier-9830495a | VP of Engineering at Maki People (joined January 2026), previously Engineering Director at Checkout.com/ubble leading identity verification product teams; Centrale Paris graduate. |
| 5 | **Aiden Loe** | Head of Science | linkedin.com/in/aiden-loe-aa93b836 | Head of Science at Maki People, leading the scientific vision ensuring every AI-driven assessment is grounded in psychometric rigor, ethical AI principles, and empirical validation; AI researcher. |

**Note on excluded candidate:** Julien Lesaicherre, who previously held the Chief Growth Officer title at Maki People (April 2025 - March 2026), has left the company and is now General Manager, France at ElevenLabs since March 2026. He is therefore excluded as a current employee.

Sources: [step_2_5_most_senior_current_employees[0]] [29], [step_2_5_most_senior_current_employees[1]] [51], [step_2_5_most_senior_current_employees[2]] [18], [step_2_5_most_senior_current_employees[3]] [47], [step_2_5_most_senior_current_employees[4]] [64], [step_2_5_most_senior_current_employees[5]] [59]

---", "step_3_5_most_recent_public_posts_last_12_months": "All posts below are from Maki People's founders. Dates are derived from LinkedIn's relative timestamps (e.g., "2d," "1w," "1mo") relative to the current date of 2026-06-11, except where an exact date was explicitly shown on the page.

| # | Date | Author | Signal (headline / first 150 chars) | Full Post URL |
|---|------|--------|--------------------------------------|---------------|
| 1 | 2026-06-09 (approx.) | Benjamin Chino | "I want to start a new series called Impact Tuesday. Every Tuesday, I'll share one concrete example of measurable business impact created with MakiPeople AI agents. This week: a global retail leader..." | linkedin.com/posts/ben-chino_i-want-to-start-a-new-series-called-impact-activity-7465039097791811584-oiS6 |
| 2 | 2026-06-04 (approx.) | Maxime Legardez Coquin | "my co-founder Benjamin Chino just launched something I love. every tuesday from now on, he'll share one concrete example of measurable business impact created with Maki AI agents. it's called..." | linkedin.com/posts/maximelegardez_my-co-founder-benjamin-chino-just-launched-activity-7465050207223730176-k9Oz |
| 3 | 2026-05-11 (approx.) | Maxime Legardez Coquin | "titles mean everything and nothing. Juliette Santelmo and Marc Desazars are 'Founder Associates' at Maki. that label doesn't capture much. it doesn't say they packed up their lives in Paris and moved..." | linkedin.com/posts/maximelegardez_titles-mean-everything-and-nothing-juliette-activity-7457437330853855232-396T |
| 4 | 2026-04-11 (approx.) | Paul-Louis Caylar | "Josh Bersin is joining Maxime Legardez Coquin next Thursday for a conversation I've been looking forward to. For the first time, AI makes it possible to build a true intelligence layer on top of..." | linkedin.com/posts/paullouiscaylar_josh-bersin-is-joining-maxime-legardez-activity-7447229110545936385-mtq4 |
| 5 | 2026-02-12 | Maxime Legardez Coquin | "At MakiPeople, we've always believed AI should support recruiters; not replace them. Our agents recommend scores grounded in science. But the..." | linkedin.com/posts/maximelegardez_activity-7427719163491565568-3fzr |

**Note on dates:** Post #5 has an explicitly confirmed date (Feb 12, 2026) from the LinkedIn page. Posts #1-4 have approximate dates calculated from LinkedIn's relative timestamps ("2d," "1w," "1mo," "2mo" respectively) as viewed from the current date of 2026-06-11; LinkedIn does not expose exact calendar dates for these posts to public viewers.

Sources: All post URLs are from LinkedIn (linkedin.com/posts/...) and were extracted/verified during this research."}
